ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., economic indicator, financial market trend) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., World Bank, Federal Reserve) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point represents */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter the data point represents */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data point represents (for monthly data) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_datasets" (
  "custom_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the custom dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the custom dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the custom dataset was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the custom dataset is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_dataset_data_points" (
  "custom_data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom data point */,
  "custom_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point represents */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter the data point represents */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data point represents (for monthly data) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_dataset_data_points_custom_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("custom_dataset_id") REFERENCES custom_datasets ("custom_dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visualization is public or private */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, pie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_data" (
  "visualization_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization data entry */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization the data belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_data_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_metadata_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)
